center.name: 賈德·戴蒙
center.summary: 賈德·戴蒙是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黄额园丁鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Originally described in 1895 based on trade skins, this elusive bird remained a mystery for nearly a hundred years, until 31 January 1981 when the American ornithologist Jared Diamond discovered the home ground of the golden-fronted bowerbird at the Foja Mountains in the Papua province of Indonesia."Thought extinct, bird found in New Guinea", Edmonton Journal, 11 November 1981, p

links.evidence: Originally described in 1895 based on trade skins, this elusive bird remained a mystery for nearly a hundred years, until 31 January 1981 when the American ornithologist Jared Diamond discovered the home ground of the golden-fronted bowerbird at the Foja Mountains in the Papua province of Indonesia."Thought extinct, bird found in New Guinea", Edmonton Journal, 11 November 1981, p
